message:
Implement PyList and PyTuple objects

PYOBJECT IMPLEMENTATIONS - PART 2 ✅

Files Created (2):
==================

1. pyobject_list.zig (430 lines)
   - PyListObject struct (dynamic array)
   - PyList_Type type object
   - Sequence protocol for lists

   Functions (15):
   - PyList_New, Size, GetItem, SetItem
   - PyList_Insert, Append
   - PyList_GetSlice, SetSlice
   - PyList_Sort, Reverse, AsTuple
   - PyList_Check, CheckExact

   Features:
   - Dynamic resizing with over-allocation
   - Sequence operations (concat, repeat)
   - Index-based access
   - Reference counting

2. pyobject_tuple.zig (321 lines)
   - PyTupleObject struct (immutable fixed array)
   - PyTuple_Type type object
   - Sequence protocol for tuples

   Functions (8):
   - PyTuple_New, Size, GetItem, SetItem
   - PyTuple_GetSlice, Pack
   - PyTuple_Check, CheckExact

   Features:
   - Immutable (no modification after creation)
   - Fixed size allocation
   - Sequence operations (concat, repeat)
   - Hash support for dict keys
   - Inline item storage (struct + items in one block)

What Works:
===========

Lists:
- Create lists: PyList_New(10)
- Append items: PyList_Append(list, item)
- Access: PyList_GetItem(list, 0)
- Slicing: PyList_GetSlice(list, 0, 5)
- Concatenation: list1 + list2
- Repeat: list * 3
- Reverse in place

Tuples:
- Create tuples: PyTuple_New(3)
- Set items: PyTuple_SetItem(tuple, 0, item)
- Access: PyTuple_GetItem(tuple, 0)
- Slicing: PyTuple_GetSlice(tuple, 0, 2)
- Concatenation: tuple1 + tuple2
- Repeat: tuple * 2
- Hashable (for dict keys)

Progress So Far:
================

✅ PyFloat (319 lines) - Main Agent
✅ PyUnicode (392 lines) - Main Agent
✅ PyList (430 lines) - Main Agent
✅ PyTuple (321 lines) - Main Agent

⏳ PyLong (pending) - Agent 2
⏳ PyBytes (pending) - Agent 2

Total: 1462 lines, 55+ functions implemented!

Not blocked - working in parallel with Agent 2! 🚀
